sect1.title: Introduction
sect1.para: The PageRankMetric class, implemented in Cython, is designed to be a specialized metric within the AnalysisG framework for calculating and analyzing PageRank-related metrics on graph structures. It inherits from the MetricTemplate class, providing a foundation for integrating PageRank calculations into the broader analysis pipeline. While the provided snippet is incomplete, its purpose is to leverage an underlying C++ PageRank implementation for high-performance graph analysis.

sect1.title: The PageRankMetric Class
sect1.para: PageRankMetric is a cdef class that inherits from MetricTemplate. This indicates its implementation as a Cython extension type, allowing for direct and optimized interaction with a C++ pagerank_metric object.

listitem.para: __cinit__(self): The Cython "constructor" equivalent, called during object allocation. It initializes a new C++ pagerank_metric object and assigns its pointer to self.ptr. It then upcasts self.ptr to a pagerank_metric* and assigns it to self.mtr for specialized access.
__init__(self): (Not explicitly defined in the provided snippet) This would typically be the Python initializer.
__dealloc__(self): (Not explicitly defined in the provided snippet) This would typically be the Cython destructor, responsible for deallocating the C++ pagerank_metric object.
Cython Implementation: The class is implemented in Cython, enabling direct binding to C++ code for performance.
C++ Backend: It relies on an underlying C++ pagerank_metric class (presumably defined in a corresponding .pxd file) to perform the actual PageRank calculations.
Inheritance: Inherits from MetricTemplate, suggesting it integrates into the generic metric processing pipeline of AnalysisG.

sect1.title: C++ Interaction
sect1.para:
The PageRankMetric class leverages Cython's capabilities for seamless C++ integration:
cdef class PageRankMetric: Declares PageRankMetric as a Cython extension type.
cdef pagerank_metric *ptr: A C++ pointer to a pagerank_metric object, managed by the Cython class.
cdef pagerank_metric *mtr: An additional C++ pointer, likely for specialized access to the pagerank_metric object.
from AnalysisG.core.tools cimport *: Imports C++ declarations from tools.pxd.
from AnalysisG.core.metric_template cimport MetricTemplate: Imports the base MetricTemplate class, from which PageRankMetric inherits.
